op.text: [as of 2025-02-24] Training for Lakefront Marathon October 2025 (signed up 2025-02-24); running four times weekly, long run Saturdays (eight miles 2025-02-22). Casual runner for years (5Ks, one half marathon ~four years ago). Chose marathon as 'something with a long arc' during difficult winter.

op.text: [as of 2025-04-01] Sam received Perception team lead offer at Austin robotics startup; strong offer in dream problem space, decision deadline early May 2025. Sam said he won't take it if it costs Dana this year of healing. Both weighing carefully.

[as of 2025-04-14] Sprained ankle badly 2025-04-13 during Forest Park trail run (mile nine, wet root); grade-two or worse per urgent care. In walking boot; seeing orthopedist 2025-04-18. Eight to ten weeks before running possible.
[as of 2025-04-14] Withdrew from Lakefront Marathon October 2025 after ankle sprain; cannot safely complete training with eight-to-ten week recovery. Withdrew immediately to avoid 'waffling.'
[as of 2025-05-11] Sam accepted Austin robotics Perception lead role with remote-from-Portland arrangement; starts June 2025, working from spare room with week in Austin every couple months

[as of 2025-08-16] VP Elaine offered Dana director role (head of merged product org) 2025-08-15; Dana declined for 2025, citing platform stabilization needs and not wanting to transition org while still escalation point. Elaine accepted; door open for spring 2026. Dana described as 'defensible not now, not a no.'
